error.folderSelectorFailed: Failed to open folder selector. Please retry.

warning.bunRequired: Please install Bun environment before launching CLI tools

page.title: Code Tools
page.description: Quickly launch multiple CLI tools to improve development efficiency

notice.bunRequired: Running CLI tools requires Bun environment
notice.codexAuthMissing: OpenAI Codex has not detected an available Codex OAuth login
notice.codexAuthHint: If using OpenAI Codex, complete Codex OAuth login in the Model Services page first.
notice.presetsShown: . Complete the matching OAuth authorization in Model Services first.
notice.modelOptional: This tool does not require selecting an OAuth model here.
notice.localCliLaunch: {{tool}} launches with its own local CLI auth/config. Warwolf does not override its model or credentials yet.
notice.managedAuthLaunch: {{tool}} will prefer the OAuth runtime currently managed by Warwolf.

placeholder.selectTool: Select the CLI tool to use

hint.envVars: Enter custom environment variables (one per line, format: KEY=value)

checkbox.autoUpdate: Check for updates and install latest version

diagnostics.noAccount: No OpenAI account connected. Please log in with ChatGPT first.
diagnostics.disabled: OpenAI service is currently disabled. Enable it to sync to Codex.
diagnostics.notWritten: Current OpenAI configuration has not been written to Codex.
diagnostics.otherProvider: Codex is currently using another provider. Re-sync OpenAI to switch.
diagnostics.configured: Connected to OpenAI with {{label}}, default model set to {{model}}.
diagnostics.connectedButNotWritten: OpenAI account connected, but configuration not yet written to Codex.
diagnostics.writtenButNotActive: OpenAI configuration written to Codex, but not yet active as the current provider.
diagnostics.waiting: Waiting for OpenAI and Codex status to return.

success.importedAuth: Imported current local Codex login credentials.
success.loginPageOpened: Browser authorization page opened. Please complete ChatGPT login.
success.profileActivated: Set this account as the current OpenAI login account.
success.defaultModelSet: Set {{modelId}} as default model. Please continue syncing to Codex.

error.presetNotLoaded: OpenAI service configuration has not finished loading.
error.pollLoginFailed: Failed to poll Codex login status.
error.enableBeforeSync: Please enable OpenAI service before syncing to Codex.
error.importAuthFailed: Failed to import current login credentials.

field.syncActiveHint: OpenAI is active as the current Codex provider
field.syncPendingHint: Will be written to ~/.codex/config.toml after sync

loading.autoInitialize: Warwolf will automatically initialize the OpenAI Provider and read the current Codex login and model status.

note.unsupported: Third-party compatible channels, API key entry, and custom Providers are not supported.

description.onlyOpenAi: Current version only supports the official OpenAI channel, authorized through Codex login.
description.openAiResponses: Official OpenAI Responses service. Warwolf only syncs configuration to `~/.codex` via Codex login.
description.codexLoginOnly: Only supports connecting to OpenAI via Codex login. Manual API key entry is not supported.
description.readOnlyConfig: This area only displays read-only configuration of the current OpenAI service. Manual modification is not supported.
description.modelCatalog: Uses the official OpenAI model catalog. Only setting the default model is allowed; manual adding, deleting, or editing is not supported.
description.diagnostics: Aggregates OpenAI login, Codex sync, and current usage status to help you quickly determine availability.

dialog.removeDescription: Remove this OpenAI login account? You can re-add it later by logging in again.

error.installFailed: Installation failed. Please check the install logs below.
error.uninstallFailed: Uninstall failed. Please check the uninstall logs below.
error.startFailed: Failed to start. Please check the install logs.

hint.apiKeyRequired: OpenClaw uses your configured provider API keys to process requests. Please ensure they are set up correctly.
hint.tokenConsumption: API tokens will be consumed after starting. Usage depends on conversation frequency and message length.

confirm.uninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall OpenClaw? Running services will be stopped.

description.installed: Powered by Warwolf providers, OpenClaw is your personal AI assistant available on WeChat, Feishu, DingTalk, QQ, and more.
description.needsMigration: An older version of OpenClaw installed via npm was detected. Please reinstall to get the latest official version.
description.notInstalled: OpenClaw is not installed on your system. Please install it first to use this feature.

error.uninstallFailedCheckLog: Uninstall failed. Please check the uninstall log below.
error.installFailedCheckLog: Install failed. Please check the install log below and retry.
error.startFailedCheckLog: Start failed. Please check the start log below and retry.

message.installSuccessStartService: ✅ Install succeeded. Please start the OpenClaw service.
message.serviceReadyOpenDashboard: ✅ Service started. You can open the OpenClaw chat page.
message.serviceReadyOpenDashboardShort: Service is ready. You can open the OpenClaw chat page.
message.cleaningAndStarting: Cleaning up old OpenClaw processes and starting service...
message.agentInPlanning: This Agent is still in the planning stage.

field.waitingForStartOrDetect: Waiting for start or detection result

description.installDescription: Installation will first try to reuse an existing OpenClaw on the machine; if no usable version is detected, it will be installed via npm.
description.startDescription: Start the OpenClaw service after installation. Once the service is ready, you can go to the chat page to check actual availability.

loading.readingAgentState: Reading Agent current state · Will switch to live view once loaded
loading.readingInstallStartStatus: Reading OpenClaw install and start status. Realtime logs and diagnostics will be shown once loaded.
